reason: Replace the legacy Nigeria VAT page contract with one reviewed Nigeria Tax Act 2025 implementation. The shared engine preserves the 7.5% standard calculation, separates section 186 exempt supplies from section 187 zero-rated supplies, labels custom rates as planning scenarios, and powers the English, French, Swahili and widget surfaces. No protected golden fixture existed for the legacy route, so the digest and route coverage change has no result delta to accept.
